{{CargoRelic
|name=Supersoldier Serum
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=09-13
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Evolution Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Sep 13, 1941, Dr. Erskine developed a super serum that was used to enhance the human body and mind.

The Supersoldier Serum can be used to enhance all the body functions and increase the brain's usage to 100%. Such genetic modification drugs have led to great advancement in science and technology in recent years, and the emergence of enhanced individuals such as the Greek Skull and the Supersoldiers.
|fame=36
|art=48
|fth=35
|civ=50
|tech=74
|ss1=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +3%<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle, Troop DEF +4
|ss2=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +4%<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle, Troop DEF +8
|ss3=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +5%<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle, Troop DEF +12
|ss4=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +7%<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle, Troop DEF +20
|ss5=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +9%<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle, Troop DEF +28
|ss7=Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +9%<br>Per 30 Mutant Minions in battle, Troop DEF +28<br>Mutant Minion Cloning SPD +7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +30 each round
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail DEF +30 each round
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Purple TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Mutant Minion Cloning Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Mutant Minion DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Power Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Power]]
[[Category:Demonic Tentacle Boost]]
[[Category:Baby Bud Boost]]
[[Category:Vampire Boost]]
